spec.title: Locale branch repository and migration drift regression

humanSummary.text: Initial audit found P1 gaps in non-JP-to-EN API/service coverage and multi-target API read fixtures. Repair commit 9d8bcf1 fixed both blockers and also extended the branch identity independence regression across patch export and benchmark artifacts. Focused re-audit found no remaining P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
